collectiondata.overview:
Under 50,000 Wonders: Big Journeys on Small Budgets with Travelxploria

Who says extraordinary experiences need an extravagant budget? At Travelxploria, we believe wanderlust shouldn’t wait—and with our Under 50,000 collection, you can discover breathtaking destinations, rich cultures, and unforgettable adventures without stretching your wallet. Whether it’s the golden sands of Dubai, the tropical charm of Southeast Asia, or the vibrant corners of India, these travel dreams are now within easy reach.

With the expert planning of the Best Travel Agency and the trusted care of your Best Tour Operator, each handpicked itinerary under ₹50,000 blends value with comfort, exploration with ease. From the bustling street markets of Bangkok to tranquil houseboat stays in Kerala, from the shimmering skylines of Dubai to the serene rice fields of Bali, we turn your tight budget into a wide canvas of possibilities.

Travelxploria’s thoughtfully curated budget tour packages include iconic landmarks, immersive cultural experiences, local flavors, and comfortable stays—crafted with the same care and service we bring to every luxury escape. Whether you're a solo traveler, a couple seeking affordable romance, or a family looking for value-packed holidays, our Best Family Package and Best Honeymoon Planner options in this range ensure something for everyone.

Don't just travel—travel smart. With Travelxploria, your dream vacation doesn’t wait for the perfect time; it begins now, under 50,000.

Let every rupee take you farther. Let every journey begin with Travelxploria.

packages.package_name: Uncover the Charm of Thailand Islands
packages.overview:
Discover Thailand’s Best with Travelxploria: Phi Phi Islands, Koh Samui, and Bangkok Adventure

Experience the vibrant charm of Thailand with Travelxploria on a tour that takes you from the crystal-clear waters of Phi Phi Islands to the serene beauty of Koh Samui and the cultural wonders of Bangkok.

Start your journey with a thrilling Phi Phi Island Tour. Cruise through the turquoise waters and visit Maya Bay, famous for its stunning scenery. Explore the awe-inspiring Viking Cave, a hidden gem, and enjoy unforgettable moments amidst the islands’ natural beauty.

Next, head to Koh Samui, Thailand’s second-largest island. Unwind at a luxurious resort, indulge in the lively nightlife at Ark Bar, and take in the island’s charm. Embark on a sightseeing tour to the iconic Big Buddha, the sacred Wat Khunaram, and the breathtaking vistas of Ang Thong Marine Park, a paradise of pristine beaches and emerald lagoons.

Your journey concludes in Bangkok, Thailand’s capital, where you’ll dive into the rich heritage of the city. Visit the majestic Grand Palace, the serene Wat Pho, and the iconic Wat Arun, capturing the essence of Thailand’s cultural treasures.

This tour offers a perfect blend of adventure, relaxation, and heritage, ensuring a memorable experience of Thailand’s most captivating destinations.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

Wake up to the serene beauty of Koh Samui, ready for a day filled with exploration and unforgettable experiences. After a hearty breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will guide you through the island’s most iconic attractions. Stroll along its pristine, palm-fringed beaches and feel the soft sand beneath your feet. Visit the revered Wat Khunaram, home to the famous mummified monk, and stand in awe before the towering 12-meter-tall Big Buddha statue. If adventure calls, set sail to Ang Thong Marine Park, where you can snorkel in crystal-clear waters or hike to Wua Talap Island for breathtaking panoramic views.

After breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative greets you at your hotel lobby and leads you on a captivating half-day tour through the heart of Bangkok. Your journey begins at the magnificent Golden Buddha, where its radiant gold glow inspires a sense of peace and reverence, before moving on to the serene Mahaputra Temple, a haven of intricate artistry and spiritual calm. The adventure continues at the dazzling Gems Gallery, where you are mesmerized by a vibrant display of cultural treasures and sparkling history. As the morning unfolds with enriching encounters and awe-inspiring sights, you are comfortably returned to your hotel in the afternoon, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Bangkok’s unique heritage.

packages.package_name: Romantic Tour of Phuket and Krabi
packages.overview: Embark on a sun-soaked, four-night escape with Travelxploria: start with two nights in vibrant Phuket, where you’ll wander colorful local markets, dive into the pulsating nightlife of Bangla Road, and unwind on golden shores before setting sail on a full-day Phi Phi Island adventure—snorkeling in crystal-clear bays, stepping ashore at iconic Maya Bay, and soaking up seaside panoramas. Then it’s off to Krabi for two nights of island hopping: explore the stunning Four Islands—Phra Nang Cave Beach’s limestone cliffs, Chicken Island’s photogenic rock formations, Poda Island’s powder-white sands, and the secluded Tup Island sandbar—interspersed with scenic boat rides and optional water sports. Throughout your journey, balance thrilling excursions with blissful beach days and sunset cocktails, all seamlessly arranged so you can simply relax, explore, and make unforgettable memories.

Resort & Villas Krabi.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Full Day 4 Islands tour by by Long tail boat with Lunch","day_summary":"

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as one of the best travel agencies for Thailand—ensuring that your day-long adventure starts off smoothly. You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. The journey continues to the Tup Islets, renowned for their striking rock formations and vibrant marine life, offering an ideal spot for snorkeling and capturing memorable photos—all under the watchful guidance of your experienced tour guide.

Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

Begin your day with a delightful journey that seamlessly blends spiritual discovery with natural rejuvenation in Krabi. After a satisfying breakfast, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative—one of Thailand’s trusted travel experts—and whisked away to the revered Tiger Cave Temple. Here, a climb through lush jungle pathways leads you to breathtaking panoramic views, setting the stage for an inspiring cultural encounter. Your adventure continues as you explore the enchanting Emerald Pool, a natural turquoise oasis nestled deep within the forest, inviting you for a refreshing dip in its crystal-clear waters. The tour culminates at the soothing Hot Springs, where steaming mineral-rich waters provide the perfect retreat for relaxation and rejuvenation. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of cultural insight and natural wonder, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Krabi’s diverse and captivating landscapes.

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria—one of Thailand’s premier travel agencies—as you set off on the Krabi 7 Islands Sunset Tour. Begin your adventure with a seamless pickup from your hotel and a short stop at Railay Beach before boarding a traditional longtail boat at Nopparat Thara Pier in Ao Nang. Under the guidance of an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, explore seven breathtaking islands that each offer their own unique allure. Discover Koh Yawasam with its expansive shallow coral gardens and pristine sandy stretches, then capture the vibrant beauty of the iconic chicken-shaped rock at Koh Kai—perfect for memorable photos. Enjoy a leisurely stop at Koh Tub, where you can relax on the beach or, at low tide, traverse the picturesque sandbank linking to nearby islets, and dip into the crystal-clear waters at Koh Tan Ming near Koh Poda.

As the day transforms into dusk, be captivated by the mesmerizing sunset on Koh Poda, where you’ll indulge in a delectable BBQ dinner served right on the beach. Savor a mouthwatering fusion of Thai flavors under a sky painted with hues of gold and crimson. To crown your magical evening, dive into an enchanting snorkeling experience amidst bio-luminescent plankton, as the ocean shimmers with an ethereal glow under the starlit sky. With hassle-free transfers back to your hotel and an itinerary designed to blend adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion, this tour promises to leave you with cherished memories of Krabi’s stunning seascapes and vibrant island life.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.overview:
• Chao Phraya River Dinner Cruise – Sail past Bangkok’s illuminated landmarks, savoring delicious Thai cuisine with live traditional performances.
  • Bangkok Sightseeing Tour – Explore Wat Traimit’s Golden Buddha, the Grand Palace, and Emerald Buddha, immersing in Thailand’s cultural heritage.
  • Safari World Bangkok – Witness exotic wildlife, thrilling animal shows, and a scenic river safari for an unforgettable adventure.
  • Krabi 7 Island Tour – Discover pristine beaches, hidden lagoons, and vibrant marine life on a breathtaking speedboat excursion.
  • Krabi Rainforest Tour – Relax in the Emerald Pool and explore Tiger Cave Temple’s serene surroundings.
  • Patong Beach & Phuket Leisure – Unwind on soft sands, try exciting watersports, or visit Phuket Trickeye Museum.
  • Phuket City Tour & Tiger Kingdom – Visit Wat Chalong, explore Old Phuket Town, and interact with majestic tigers.
  • Phi Phi Island Tour – Snorkel in crystal-clear waters, relax at Maya Bay, and explore vibrant marine life.

[{"city":"Bangkok","country":"Thailand","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Bangkok/1740928393653-1740592915438-AdobeStock_131653309-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Bangkok/1740928394067-1740592915646-AdobeStock_171690662-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Bangkok/1740928396663-1740592915011-AdobeStock_98443741-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Bangkok/1744961625353-AdobeStock_1612425-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Bangkok with Chao Phraya River Dinner Cruise","day_summary":"

Welcome to Bangkok, the vibrant heart of Thailand! As you arrive at Bangkok Airport, our friendly Travelxploria representative will be there to warmly greet you. Sit back and relax as you’re comfortably transferred to your hotel. Once you check in, take some time to unwind and soak in the city’s energy.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

After breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative greets you at your hotel lobby and leads you on a captivating half-day tour through the heart of Bangkok. Your journey begins at the magnificent Golden Buddha, where its radiant gold glow inspires a sense of peace and reverence, before moving on to the serene Mahaputra Temple, a haven of intricate artistry and spiritual calm. The adventure continues at the dazzling Gems Gallery, where you are mesmerized by a vibrant display of cultural treasures and sparkling history. As the morning unfolds with enriching encounters and awe-inspiring sights, you are comfortably returned to your hotel in the afternoon, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Bangkok’s unique heritage.

After a hearty breakfast at your hotel, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative, setting the stage for a day of excitement and exploration. Your adventure begins at the Safari Park, where you'll wander through lush, expansive landscapes and encounter majestic animals roaming in naturalistic habitats. Each step brings you closer to Thailand's vibrant wildlife, as you marvel at the beauty and diversity of nature.

Next, the journey continues at the Marine Park, where a world of color and life unfolds before your eyes. Here, engaging exhibits and vivid aquatic displays reveal the enchanting mysteries of the underwater realm. As the day unfolds, you'll indulge in a sumptuous buffet lunch, featuring a delightful fusion of local and international flavors that perfectly complements your adventure.

With your appetite and senses thoroughly satisfied, you'll be gently returned to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of a day filled with the splendor of both land and sea, all expertly curated by Travelxploria.

After a delightful stay, it’s time to check out and continue your journey with Travelxploria. Our representative will ensure a smooth transfer to the airport for your flight to the breathtaking paradise of Krabi. Upon arrival, you'll be warmly welcomed and escorted to your hotel, where you can relax and soak in the stunning tropical vibes.

Afterwards embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria—one of Thailand’s premier travel agencies—as you set off on the Krabi 7 Islands Sunset Tour. Begin your adventure with a seamless pickup from your hotel and a short stop at Railay Beach before boarding a traditional longtail boat at Nopparat Thara Pier in Ao Nang. Under the guidance of an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, explore seven breathtaking islands that each offer their own unique allure. Discover Koh Yawasam with its expansive shallow coral gardens and pristine sandy stretches, then capture the vibrant beauty of the iconic chicken-shaped rock at Koh Kai—perfect for memorable photos. Enjoy a leisurely stop at Koh Tub, where you can relax on the beach or, at low tide, traverse the picturesque sandbank linking to nearby islets, and dip into the crystal-clear waters at Koh Tan Ming near Koh Poda.

As the day transforms into dusk, be captivated by the mesmerizing sunset on Koh Poda, where you’ll indulge in a delectable BBQ dinner served right on the beach. Savor a mouthwatering fusion of Thai flavors under a sky painted with hues of gold and crimson. To crown your magical evening, dive into an enchanting snorkeling experience amidst bio-luminescent plankton, as the ocean shimmers with an ethereal glow under the starlit sky. With hassle-free transfers back to your hotel and an itinerary designed to blend adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion, this tour promises to leave you with cherished memories of Krabi’s stunning seascapes and vibrant island life.

Start your day with an exciting Krabi Rainforest Discovery Tour, guided by our Travelxploria representative. Begin at Thung Teao Forest Natural Park, where lush greenery surrounds the stunning Emerald Pool take a refreshing dip in its therapeutic waters. Next, explore the Tiger Cave Temple, famous for its mystical tiger paw prints and spiritual ambiance. Take in breathtaking coastal views of the Andaman Sea, capturing the essence of Krabi’s natural beauty. After an enriching day of adventure and tranquility, return to your hotel for a well-deserved rest, reminiscing about the wonders you explored.

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

Embark on an exhilarating journey in Phuket as you're promptly picked up from your hotel by a friendly Travelxploria representative and whisked away to the renowned Tiger Kingdom—a sanctuary where majestic tigers roam in lush, naturalistic settings. Here, you'll not only marvel at these powerful creatures but also enjoy a unique, interactive experience where you can touch and take photos with the tigers of your choice, creating unforgettable memories. Guided by knowledgeable staff dedicated to wildlife conservation, you'll gain fascinating insights into tiger behavior, their natural habitat, and the critical efforts underway to protect these magnificent animals. With seamless transfers ensuring your comfort, this tour offers an exceptional blend of adventure, hands-on interaction, and educational enrichment that deepens your appreciation for Thailand’s rich wildlife heritage.

Embark on an exhilarating journey in Phuket as you're promptly picked up from your hotel by a friendly Travelxploria representative and whisked away to the renowned Tiger Kingdom—a sanctuary where majestic tigers roam in lush, naturalistic settings. Here, you'll not only marvel at these powerful creatures but also enjoy a unique, interactive experience where you can touch and take photos with the tigers of your choice, creating unforgettable memories. Guided by knowledgeable staff dedicated to wildlife conservation, you'll gain fascinating insights into tiger behavior, their natural habitat, and the critical efforts underway to protect these magnificent animals. With seamless transfers ensuring your comfort, this tour offers an exceptional blend of adventure, hands-on interaction, and educational enrichment that deepens your appreciation for Thailand’s rich wildlife heritage.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.overview:
Feel the warm Andaman breeze as you step off the ferry onto Krabi’s sun-kissed shores—your two-night escape begins with Travelxploria in full swing. Day One, we whisk you by private longtail boat to the legendary “Four Islands”: marvel at the emerald pools of Poda Island, stroll along the ivory sands of Chicken Island, snorkel amidst rainbow-fish in Tub Island’s coral gardens, and stand in awe at the karst cliffs framing Tup Island’s heart-shaped lagoon. As the sun dips low, return to your cliff-side boutique bungalow overlooking Railay Beach, where a sunset cocktail awaits and fire-dancers trace flames against a velvet sky.

Dawn of Day Two finds you gliding across limestone-splashed waters to the world-famous Phi Phi archipelago. On Phi Phi Don, we’ve arranged a private beach lunch beneath swaying palms, followed by a guided trek up to the iconic viewpoint—your lens will capture a panorama of turquoise bays and jagged isles. Dive into Maya Bay’s storied shallows or join our onboard marine biologist for a hands-on snorkeling session at Bamboo Island, discovering vibrant anemones and playful parrotfish. That evening, sail back to Krabi for a starlit seafood feast on Ao Nang’s waterfront, before drifting to sleep to the sound of lapping tides.

On Day Three, Travelxploria transfers you to Phuket in effortless comfort. Your three-night stay at a secluded hillside resort comes with cliff-pool vistas and spa treatments infused with local botanicals. Day Four is yours to roam Patong’s lively streets or unwind on Kata’s crescent beach, but at dusk we’ll escort you to the dazzling Phuket FantaSea cultural extravaganza. Watch elephants march in choreographed splendor, gasp at acrobats soaring above the Grand Palace stage, and savor a lavish Thai banquet fit for royalty. Your final full day can be spent kayaking through Phang Nga Bay’s James Bond-worthy limestone caves or simply lounging poolside with a coconut in hand.

Whether you seek pulsating adventure or serene relaxation, Travelxploria’s seamless orchestration—from Krabi’s hidden lagoons and Phi Phi’s cinematic beauty to Phuket’s electric nights—ensures every moment of your 2-night Krabi, 3-night Phuket odyssey becomes a treasured chapter in your travel story.

Or choose the optional Krabi 4 Island Tour, discovering its stunning highlights. Hop between pristine islands, soaking in the beauty of crystal-clear waters and white sandy beaches.

End the day with a stunning sunset and return to the hotel for a restful sleep.

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

In the evening, you'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to embark on an unforgettable Phuket FantaSea tour. As one of the best tour operators in the region, we ensure a smooth and memorable journey as you are transported to this dazzling cultural theme park. Upon arrival, you’ll be immersed in a spectacular show that brings Thailand's rich heritage to life through captivating performances, intricate costumes, acrobatics, and breathtaking pyrotechnics. The magical atmosphere of Phuket FantaSea, with its unique blend of tradition and fantasy, promises an evening full of wonder and excitement. After experiencing the enchantment of the night, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, leaving you with lasting memories of Thailand’s vibrant cultural spirit.

packages.overview:
• Tiger Park Pattaya – Experience the thrill of close encounters with majestic tigers, capturing unforgettable moments with these incredible creatures.
  • Alcazar Cabaret Show – Be mesmerized by a dazzling display of music, dance, and culture in a vibrant, high-energy performance.
  • Coral Island Tour – Escape to pristine beaches, soak in the sun, or dive into thrilling water adventures in turquoise waters.
  • Underwater World Pattaya – Walk through a mesmerizing underwater tunnel, surrounded by exotic marine life and colorful coral reefs.
  • Bangkok City & Temple Tour – Explore the cultural heart of Bangkok, visiting iconic temples and historic landmarks.
  • Chao Phraya Princess Dinner Cruise – Sail along the illuminated skyline of Bangkok, enjoying a luxurious dinner with live entertainment.
  • Safari World & Marine Park – Witness fascinating wildlife, thrilling animal shows, and up-close encounters with exotic species.

As you arrive at Bangkok Airport, a warm welcome awaits you from our Travelxploria representative, who will ensure a seamless transfer to your hotel in Pattaya. Sit back and relax in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle as you journey through scenic landscapes toward the vibrant coastal city.

Get up close with majestic tigers at Tiger Park Pattaya on this thrilling experience, brought to you by Travelxploria,Enjoy a hassle-free hotel pick-up, accompanied by our representative and an expert tour guide, ensuring a safe and memorable visit. Walk among these incredible big cats and capture once-in-a-lifetime photos as you interact with tigers of various sizes in a well-maintained, ethical environment. Learn about their care, behavior, and conservation efforts while experiencing a unique wildlife encounter. After an exhilarating day, relax as we provide a hotel drop-off, making this adventure smooth and enjoyable. With the best on-ground support staff, this tour guarantees the ultimate wildlife experience in Pattaya.

Experience the magic of Pattaya’s world-famous Alcazar Cabaret Show with seamless hotel pick-up and drop-off by your Travelxploria representative.We ensure an unforgettable evening with the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide. Witness a dazzling spectacle of glamorous performances, extravagant costumes, and mesmerizing choreography in a state-of-the-art theater. This high-energy cabaret show blends Thai culture with global influences, creating a visual masterpiece that will leave you in awe. Sit back, relax, and enjoy a night of entertainment, music, and vibrant performances. After the show, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off at your hotel making your Pattaya experience will be truly unforgettable.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off.

Dive into an enchanting underwater experience with Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, as we take you on a journey through Underwater World Pattaya. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pick-up, accompanied by our representative and expert tour guide, ensuring you have the best experience. Walk through the stunning 100-meter-long acrylic tunnel, where vibrant marine life surrounds you on all sides. Discover a variety of sea creatures, from graceful stingrays to majestic sharks, and even enjoy interactive feeding sessions. Whether you’re a marine enthusiast or simply looking for a fun and educational experience, this aquarium promises excitement for all ages. After a memorable adventure, relax as we provide a comfortable hotel drop-off making memories truly unforgettable.

After a delightful stay in Pattaya, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with check-out and ensure a smooth transfer to Bangkok. Relax in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle as you travel through scenic routes toward Thailand’s vibrant capital. Along the way, take in glimpses of local life, bustling markets, and lush landscapes. Upon arrival, you will check-in at your hotel

Our Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an immersive Bangkok City and Temple Tour that unveils the city's majestic heritage. Begin your journey at the illustrious Grand Palace and the sacred Wat Phra Kaew, where intricate details and timeless artistry narrate Thailand's rich history and spiritual legacy. Continue to the revered Wat Pho, home to the magnificent reclining Buddha, and then cross over to admire the shimmering beauty of Wat Arun with its unique, porcelain-adorned spires. Whether you opt for a guided tour complete with admission tickets for a seamless experience or decide to explore these iconic landmarks on your own, this adventure promises an unforgettable blend of cultural splendor and modern vibrancy in the heart of Bangkok.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

packages.overview: Travelxploria invites you to begin your Thailand adventure with a scenic transfer to the lively coastal city of Pattaya. In the evening, be enchanted by the spectacular Alcazar Show, featuring vibrant costumes, energetic dances, and dazzling stage performances. Cruise across sparkling waters to Coral Island by speedboat, where turquoise seas and golden sands offer the perfect setting for thrilling water activities and a delicious seaside lunch. Next, head to bustling Bangkok for an enriching city tour, exploring its magnificent temples, rich culture, and architectural marvels. Your journey concludes with a thrilling day at Safari World & Marine Park, where exotic wildlife encounters, safari rides, and lively marine shows create unforgettable memories.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off.

As you arrive in Bangkok from Pattaya, our Travelxploria representative will be there to greet you with a warm welcome. You’ll be comfortably transferred to your hotel, where you can check in and unwind after your journey.

Get ready for an immersive Bangkok City and Temple Tour that unveils the city's majestic heritage. Begin your journey at the illustrious Grand Palace and the sacred Wat Phra Kaew, where intricate details and timeless artistry narrate Thailand's rich history and spiritual legacy. Continue to the revered Wat Pho, home to the magnificent reclining Buddha, and then cross over to admire the shimmering beauty of Wat Arun with its unique, porcelain-adorned spires. Whether you opt for a guided tour complete with admission tickets for a seamless experience or decide to explore these iconic landmarks on your own, this adventure promises an unforgettable blend of cultural splendor and modern vibrancy in the heart of Bangkok.

After a hearty breakfast at your hotel, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative, setting the stage for a day of excitement and exploration. Your adventure begins at the Safari Park, where you'll wander through lush, expansive landscapes and encounter majestic animals roaming in naturalistic habitats. Each step brings you closer to Thailand's vibrant wildlife, as you marvel at the beauty and diversity of nature.

Next, the journey continues at the Marine Park, where a world of color and life unfolds before your eyes. Here, engaging exhibits and vivid aquatic displays reveal the enchanting mysteries of the underwater realm. As the day unfolds, you'll indulge in a sumptuous buffet lunch, featuring a delightful fusion of local and international flavors that perfectly complements your adventure.

With your appetite and senses thoroughly satisfied, you'll be gently returned to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of a day filled with the splendor of both land and sea, all expertly curated by Travelxploria.

packages.package_name: From Merlion to Petronas: Singapore & Malaysia Tour
packages.overview:
• Arrive in Singapore – Night Safari
    Explore the world’s first Night Safari, witnessing exotic nocturnal wildlife.
  • Sentosa Island & City Landmarks
    Visit Sentosa Island, Thian Hock Keng Temple, Merlion, and Singapore Botanic Gardens.
  • Universal Studios Adventure
    Enjoy thrilling rides and immersive experiences at Universal Studios Singapore.
  • Transfer to Genting Highlands
    Travel to Genting Highlands, a mountain resort filled with entertainment.
  • Genting SkyWorlds & Kuala Lumpur
    Have fun at Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park, then head to Kuala Lumpur.
  • Kuala Lumpur Sightseeing
    Explore King’s Palace, Petronas Twin Towers, and the National Monument.
  • Departure
    Fly back home with cherished memories of Singapore & Malaysia.

After your thrilling night of exploration, we ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Embark on a seamless exploration of Singapore’s most iconic landmarks with Travelxploria’s best-in-class service. Our experienced tour guide and on-ground support staff ensure a hassle-free journey, starting with Sentosa Island, where pristine beaches, luxury resorts, and thrilling attractions await. Next, visit the historic Thian Hock Keng Temple, a masterpiece of Chinese architecture, where our guide shares intriguing tales of Singapore’s rich heritage. Continue to the Merlion, Singapore’s national symbol, offering breathtaking waterfront views, perfect for capturing unforgettable moments. Conclude the day with a peaceful stroll through the UNESCO-listed Singapore Botanic Gardens, home to lush greenery and vibrant orchid displays. With Travelxploria’s seamless pick-up and drop-off service, your experience remains effortless, leaving you free to immerse yourself in the beauty and culture of Singapore.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Universal Studios","day_summary":"

Universal Studios Singapore is a world-class theme park located on Sentosa Island, offering a thrilling experience with seven uniquely themed zones, including Hollywood, Sci-Fi City, Jurassic Park, and Far Far Away. Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

National Monument","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Get ready for an awe-inspiring visit to the Petronas Twin Towers with Travelxploria! After a convenient hotel pick-up in a comfortable vehicle, our friendly representative and expert guide will accompany you to Kuala Lumpur’s most iconic landmark. Marvel at the breathtaking skyline from the observation deck on the 86th floor and walk the famous Skybridge, which connects the twin towers. Learn fascinating insights about the tower’s architecture and history as you soak in panoramic city views. Capture stunning photos before we ensure a smooth drop-off back at your hotel, making your experience seamless and unforgettable!​

Step into the grandeur of Istana Negara, the King’s Palace of Malaysia, with Travelxploria! Your journey begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up by our friendly representative, ensuring a smooth ride to this magnificent landmark. Accompanied by our expert guide, marvel at the stunning golden domes and majestic architecture of the official residence of the Malaysian King. Witness the Royal Guard ceremony, capturing iconic photos against the grand palace gates. Our guide will share fascinating insights into Malaysia’s monarchy, culture, and traditions, making your visit an enriching experience. Stroll through the beautifully maintained palace grounds and absorb the regal ambiance. After admiring this symbol of Malaysia’s royal heritage, take a moment to relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and luxurious experience with Travelxploria. A visit to the King’s Palace is truly a royal affair not to be missed!

Begin your spiritual and cultural journey as Travelxploria’s representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Upon arrival at the National Mosque of Malaysia (Masjid Negara), our expert guide will provide fascinating insights into its stunning architecture, rich Islamic heritage, and deep cultural significance. Admire the mosque’s grand 73-meter-high minaret, striking blue-tiled dome, and beautifully landscaped gardens. Step inside the vast prayer hall, where intricate Islamic calligraphy and elegant design create a serene ambiance. Learn about Malaysia’s diverse Islamic influences and the mosque’s role in the nation’s spiritual life. Stroll through the reflecting pools and fountains, capturing breathtaking photos of this iconic landmark. Whether seeking cultural enrichment or peaceful reflection, this visit promises an unforgettable experience. After exploring, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and enriching journey with Travelxploria.​

packages.overview:
• Kuala Lumpur Arrival & City Exploration – Arrive in Kuala Lumpur, explore Putrajaya, enjoy a guided city tour, and visit a Chocolate Boutique.
  • Batu Caves & Genting Highlands Adventure – Visit the iconic Batu Caves, enjoy a scenic drive to Genting Highlands, and experience the thrills of Skyworld Theme Park.
  • Leisure Day or Sunway Lagoon (Optional) – Relax at your own pace or opt for a fun-filled day at Sunway Lagoon with water rides and adventure zones.
  • Kuala Lumpur to Singapore & City Tour – Travel to Singapore, explore landmarks like the Merlion, Marina Bay Sands, and visit the mesmerizing Gardens by the Bay.
  • Mandai Bird Park & Sentosa Island – Discover exotic birds at Mandai Bird Park, enjoy views from MBS Sky Park, and take a scenic cable car ride to Sentosa.
  • Leisure Day or Universal Studios & S.E.A. Aquarium (Optional) – Free day to explore or enjoy thrilling rides at Universal Studios and marine wonders at S.E.A. Aquarium.
  • Departure – Bid farewell to Singapore and head to Changi Airport with unforgettable memories. Safe travels.

Upon arrival in Kuala Lumpur, our Travelxploria representative will warmly greet you, ensuring a seamless transfer to your hotel. Your journey begins with an orientation tour of Putrajaya, Malaysia’s administrative capital, where stunning architecture, serene lakes, and iconic landmarks like the Putra Mosque and Perdana Putra set the stage for a memorable experience. With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, explore Kuala Lumpur’s vibrant cityscape, from the colonial charm of Merdeka Square to the majestic Sultan Abdul Samad Building. Indulge in a delightful stop at the Chocolate Boutique, where you can savor and shop for Malaysia’s finest handmade chocolates. Throughout the day, our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with smooth pick-ups, drop-offs, and expert insights into the city’s rich history and culture. Get ready to be enchanted by Kuala Lumpur’s unique fusion of tradition and modernity.

Lumpur/Sheraton Imperial Kuala Lumpur Hotel/1741437668476-Sheraton Imperial Kuala Lumpur Hotel 3.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Batu Caves & Genting Highlands Adventure","day_summary":"

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Hotel.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Visit Mandai Bird Park - MBS Sky Park (Non-Peak timimgs) - Visit Sentosa Island by one-way cable car","day_summary":"

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

A visit to Marina Bay is incomplete without experiencing the SkyPark Observation Deck, offering stunning views 57 stories above Singapore. Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before our expert Travelxploria guide picks you up from your hotel. At the SkyPark, indulge in a luxurious wine-and-dine experience, enjoy the breathtaking skyline, and shop for exclusive souvenirs while gazing at the world’s largest infinity pool. With our convenient hotel pickup and drop-off, you can relax and soak in the unforgettable sights of Singapore’s iconic Marina Bay.

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

packages.overview:
• Canopy Park Adventure – Explore lush indoor gardens, a mirror maze, and breathtaking attractions at Jewel Changi.
  • Thrilling Night Safari – Witness over 2,500 nocturnal animals in their natural habitat on a guided tram ride.
  • Iconic City Tour – Discover Marina Bay Sands, Merlion Park, Chinatown, and Little India on a flexible Hop-On Hop-Off tour.
  • Gardens by the Bay – Marvel at the Supertree Grove, Cloud Forest, and Flower Dome with stunning city views.
  • Universal Studios Excitement – Experience exhilarating rides, immersive attractions, and beloved movie characters in seven themed zones.
  • Sentosa Island Escapade – Enjoy pristine beaches, thrilling theme parks, and adventure-packed activities.
  • S.E.A. Aquarium – Explore a breathtaking underwater world with over 100,000 marine creatures across 45 habitats.
  • Wings of Time Spectacle – End the night with a dazzling display of lights, water, and pyrotechnics by the sea.
  • Singapore River Cruise – A scenic boat ride offering picturesque views of historic landmarks and modern architecture.
  • Mandai Wildlife Reserve – Discover the Singapore Zoo, River Wonders, and Bird Paradise in a nature-filled adventure.
  • Breakfast in the Wild – Enjoy a unique dining experience with orangutans at the Singapore Zoo.
  • National Museum & Art Museum – Immerse yourself in Singapore’s rich history and contemporary art scene.
  • Resorts World Sentosa – Visit top attractions, including Madame Tussauds, Mega Adventure Park, and Adventure Cove Waterpark.
  • Fantasy World & Ice Cream Museum – Step into a whimsical world of fun exhibits and delicious treats.
  • Singapore Cable Car Ride – Enjoy breathtaking aerial views of Mount Faber and Sentosa.
  • Merlion Park – Capture picture-perfect moments at Singapore’s iconic symbol near Marina Bay.
  • Avatar Experience at Gardens by the Bay – Step into a bioluminescent world inspired by the film Avatar.

Touch down in the vibrant city of Singapore, where our Travelxploria representative ensures a warm welcome, providing seamless pick-up and drop-off for a hassle-free arrival. As you settle into your hotel, soak in the city’s stunning skyline and tropical charm. In the evening, embark on an unforgettable adventure at the world-famous Night Safari Zoo. With the best on-ground support, enjoy a guided tram ride through lush rainforest landscapes, spotting over 2,500 nocturnal animals in their natural habitat. This immersive experience, blending thrill and education, is the perfect way to kickstart your Singapore journey with Travelxploria!

Dive into Singapore’s rich heritage at the National Museum of Singapore, where interactive exhibits and historical artifacts bring the country’s story to life. From its early days to its modern identity, this immersive experience offers a deeper understanding of Singapore’s transformation.

Next, explore the Singapore Art Museum, an architectural gem blending art, science, culture, and technology. With its ever-evolving interactive exhibitions, this museum captivates visitors of all ages, making it an engaging and inspiring experience. Whether you're an art enthusiast or a curious explorer, these museums offer a perfect blend of history, creativity, and innovation.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Exploring Singapore’s Icons: Gardens by the Bay & Merlion Park","day_summary":"

Experience the perfect blend of nature and innovation at Gardens by the Bay, where the towering Supertree Grove, misty Cloud Forest, and vibrant Flower Dome showcase exotic plants from around the world against the backdrop of Singapore’s stunning skyline. Wander through this futuristic garden wonderland, capturing breathtaking views at every turn. Then, head to Merlion Park, home to Singapore’s iconic lion-headed, fish-bodied statue, symbolizing the city’s rich heritage. Set against the dazzling Marina Bay Sands, this picturesque spot offers the perfect opportunity to soak in the city's beauty and snap unforgettable photos.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Singapore River Cruise","day_summary":"

Experience the charm of Singapore from a unique perspective with a Singapore River Cruise, where history and modernity blend seamlessly. Glide along the iconic Singapore River, passing by historic landmarks like the Merlion, the vibrant Clarke Quay, and beautifully preserved colonial buildings. As the city lights reflect on the water, soak in breathtaking views of Singapore’s evolving skyline. This relaxing boat ride offers a perfect way to discover the city's rich heritage while enjoying a tranquil escape from the bustling streets.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Singapore","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, check out from your hotel and enjoy a seamless transfer to Changi International Airport, arranged by Travelxploria’s best on-ground support. Take a moment to reflect on the unforgettable experiences, from iconic landmarks and thrilling attractions to cultural discoveries and serene landscapes. As you board your flight home, cherish the wonderful memories of your Singapore adventure, knowing that another exciting journey awaits in the future. Safe travels and see you again soon!

packages.overview:
• Burj Khalifa – The world’s tallest building, offering breathtaking city views from its observation decks.

  • Palm Jumeirah – A man-made island home to luxury resorts, including Atlantis, The Palm.

  • Burj Al Arab – The world-famous sail-shaped luxury hotel.

  • Dubai Frame – A unique structure providing panoramic views of old and new Dubai.

  • Dubai Mall – One of the largest malls in the world, featuring an indoor aquarium, ice rink, and luxury shopping.

  • Mall of the Emirates – Home to Ski Dubai, an indoor ski resort.

  • Global Village – A cultural and shopping festival featuring pavilions from different countries.

  • Desert Safari – A thrilling experience with dune bashing, camel rides, and Arabian-style entertainment.

  • Dubai Marina Dhow Cruise – A luxurious dinner cruise with stunning views of Dubai’s skyline.

  • Skydiving & Hot Air Ballooning – For adrenaline seekers, experiences over Palm Jumeirah or the desert.

[{"city":"Dubai","country":"United Arab Emirates","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928568199-1740768577013-pexels-abbas-mohammed-1990079-3680912.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928498628-1740768485316-AdobeStock_285462763-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928496279-1740768483363-AdobeStock_107329050-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928497898-1740768484810-AdobeStock_274923414-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/United Arab Emirates/Dubai/1740928497623-1740768484615-AdobeStock_245665968-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Dubai with visit to Ain Dubai","day_summary":"

As you arrive at Dubai International Airport, a representative of Travelxploria will be there to welcome you with warm hospitality. From the moment you step into this vibrant city, our expert representative will ensure a seamless experience. Sit back and relax as our comfortable transfer takes you to your luxurious hotel, offering glimpses of Dubai’s iconic skyline along the way. 

Experience breathtaking panoramic views from the world’s tallest observation wheel, Ain Dubai! Your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a smooth journey to this iconic attraction, offering you the best on-ground support. Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

Afterwards, get ready for an exciting evening at Global Village, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, making sure you have a smooth and stress-free journey. With your entry ticket included, step into a vibrant world of over 90 country pavilions, each filled with authentic crafts, flavours, and traditions. Wander through lively streets, watch dazzling performances, hop on thrilling rides, and taste mouth-watering dishes from around the globe. From shopping for unique souvenirs to enjoying live music and street entertainment, every moment is an adventure. As the night winds down, relax in comfort as we drop you back at your hotel.

Escape into a winter paradise at Ski Dubai, where the magic of snow meets the heart of the desert. Your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience as you step into this indoor winter wonderland. With the best on-ground support staff, glide down the powdery slopes, try your hand at snowboarding, or have fun in the Snow Park. Meet adorable penguins, build snowmen, or take a thrilling ride on the Mountain Thriller. Travelxploria, the best travel agency, guarantees an unforgettable adventure in this icy escape, making you forget you're in the middle of Dubai’s desert.

Afterwards embark on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

Escape into a world of aquatic adventure at Aquaventure Waterpark, the crown jewel of Atlantis, The Palm! Your Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth and hassle-free ride to this record-breaking waterpark. With your entry ticket included, get ready to brave the tallest waterslides, ride rushing rapids, and float through twisting rivers. Feel the rush on the Leap of Faith, where you’ll plunge down a near-vertical slide through a shark-filled lagoon. Experience the thrill of Poseidon's Revenge, challenge the Aquaconda, or simply unwind on the private beach. Whether you're a thrill-seeker or a beach lover, there's something for everyone. Enjoy endless splashes, exciting rides, and Dubai’s ultimate water adventure! After an unforgettable day, relax and enjoy a comfortable ride back to your hotel.

Dive into a mesmerizing underwater world at The Lost Chambers Aquarium, where the myth of Atlantis comes to life, the Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey to this enchanting marine wonderland. With your entry ticket included, step into a world of mystical ruins and submerged tunnels, home to over 65,000 marine creatures. Watch majestic sharks, graceful stingrays, and colourful tropical fish swim past you in stunning glass tunnels. Explore interactive touch pools, learn about marine conservation, and witness fascinating feeding sessions as expert aquarists share insights into these incredible sea creatures. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or just seeking a peaceful escape, The Lost Chambers offers a truly magical experience. After immersing yourself in this aquatic paradise, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

After a hearty breakfast, get ready for a magical journey into the Dubai Mall Aquarium & Underwater Zoo. Our friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience. Step into the spectacular underwater tunnel, where sharks, rays, and exotic fish glide gracefully around you, creating an awe-inspiring sight. Then, explore the Underwater Zoo, home to fascinating creatures like playful otters, massive crocodiles, and colourful amphibians. Wander through interactive exhibits, get up close with unique marine species, and learn about the wonders of the ocean in a fun and engaging way. Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

Step into a living masterpiece at Dubai Miracle Garden, the world’s largest natural flower garden, where over 150 million blooms create stunning floral displays. Your friendly Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, wander through a magical landscape, where heart-shaped archways, whimsical castles, and a full-scale Emirates A380 covered in flowers bring nature and creativity to life. Stroll along vibrant pathways, breathe in the fragrant air, and snap unforgettable photos at every turn. From the floating flower lady to cozy gazebos draped in blossoms, every corner feels like a fairy-tale escape. Whether you're a nature lover, a photography enthusiast, or simply looking for a peaceful retreat, Miracle Garden is a sight to behold. After soaking in its beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.


Escape into a whimsical paradise at Dubai Butterfly Garden, where thousands of delicate, colorful butterflies flutter around in a lush, tropical setting. A Travelxploria representative and guidewill pick you up from your hotel, ensuring asmooth and hassle-free journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the beautifully designed domes, where butterflies dance through the air, resting gently on flowers—and maybe even on you! Stroll through vibrant gardens, learn about their fascinating life cycle, and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere. Whether you're a nature lover or just looking for a magical experience, this place is pure enchantment. After soaking in the beauty, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

packages.overview:
Welcome to Travelxploria’s “Future & Folklore: The Dubai Fusion Tour”, where we invite you to experience a city that’s as ambitious as it is timeless. From the moment you touch down in this gleaming metropolis, our expert guides will whisk you away to the heights of the Burj Khalifa—where panoramic views stretch from the Arabian Gulf to the endless desert horizon. As the sun tilts westward, you’ll descend into the heart of the city’s heritage: wandering spice-scented souks, bargaining for treasures in ancient alleyways, and sipping sweet mint tea as the call to prayer drifts through the air.

On day two, trade skyscrapers for sand dunes with our private desert safari. Feel the thrill of dune bashing in a 4×4, pause for sunset photography against a backdrop of rolling ochre waves, and settle in under the stars at a Bedouin-style camp. Here, you’ll savor a traditional barbecue feast, watch live folk dances, and learn about Emirati culture straight from local hosts—all under the glow of lantern light.

Throughout your journey, Travelxploria’s commitment to seamless service means you travel in comfort and style. Whether you’re indulging in world-class shopping at the Dubai Mall, exploring Palm Jumeirah’s architectural marvels, or toasting to new horizons on a sunset dhow cruise, every moment is curated to leave you inspired. Let’s fly to your dream destination—and discover how Dubai’s dazzling future and rich traditions come together to create the adventure of a lifetime

Welcome to Dubai! After settling in at your hotel, get ready for a magical evening. After a delicious breakfast, get ready for an unforgettable adventure through the heart of Dubai! Our friendly Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable start to your day. With the best on-ground support staff, embark on a journey that showcases the perfect blend of tradition and modernity. Step into history at the Dubai Museum, where ancient artifacts and immersive exhibits bring the city’s past to life. Wander through the bustling Gold and Spice Souks, where vibrant colors and rich aromas create an unforgettable sensory experience. Drive along the stunning coastline, stopping for breathtaking views of the Burj Al Arab and the luxurious Palm Jumeirah. Explore the charming Al Fahidi Historical District, and end your tour at the awe-inspiring Dubai Frame, offering panoramic views of old and new Dubai. After a day filled with discovery, relax as we drop you back at your hotel. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, every moment of your Dubai tour is designed for an extraordinary experience.

Get ready for an unforgettable experience as you soar to the 124th and 125th floors of the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey. With your entry ticket included, step into the high-speed elevator and feel the excitement as you ascend to breath-taking heights in seconds. Once at the top, step onto the observation deck and take in unmatched panoramic views of Dubai’s skyline, golden desert, and shimmering coastline. Whether you're capturing photos, gazing through the interactive telescopes, or simply soaking in the awe-inspiring scenery, this is a moment to cherish. After thisonce-in-a-lifetime experience, sit back and relaxas wedrop you back at your hotel.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exhilarating Desert Safari that promises adventure and cultural charm! Our friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up in a luxurious 4x4 land cruiser, ready to whisk you away into the golden dunes of Dubai. Feel the rush of dune bashing, sandboarding, and a camel ride, or take it up a notch with an optional quad biking adventure. As the sun paints the sky in fiery hues, unwind at a traditional Bedouin camp, where a sumptuous BBQ dinner awaits, paired with mesmerizing Belly Dance and Tanoura performances. End the night with a smooth hotel drop-off, taking home memories of an enchanting desert escape.

packages.overview: Touch down in Dubai and let Travelxploria transform your journey into seamless luxury: begin with a private Dubai city tour—exploring the historic Al Fahidi Quarter, fragrant spice and gold souks, and the futuristic marvels of Downtown—before whisking you to Abu Dhabi’s cultural crown jewels, the Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque and Louvre Abu Dhabi with VIP entry. Return to Dubai for an exhilarating desert safari: dune-bashing in 4×4 jeeps, a sunset camel trek and a Bedouin-style barbecue under starlit skies complete with traditional music and falconry displays. The next day, ascend to the clouds with fast-track access to the Burj Khalifa’s 124th-floor observation deck, then unwind on a sunset cruise through the twinkling waters of Dubai Marina aboard a luxury dhow, complete with gourmet canapés and chilled refreshments. Every detail—from expert guides and exclusive skip-the-line privileges to personalized concierge touches—is artfully arranged by Travelxploria so you can savor every moment of your Arabian adventure without a single worry.

Whether you're marvelling at the beauty of the deep sea or meeting incredible wildlife, this experience is perfect for all ages. After an unforgettable adventure, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with mesmerizing memories of Dubai’s underwater world.

Explore the wonders of Abu Dhabi, a city where tradition meets modern luxury, on an unforgettable tour! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless and comfortable journey. Start your adventure at the majestic Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, where shimmering chandeliers, intricate carvings, and gleaming white domes create a sight to behold. Then, enjoy a scenic drive along the Corniche, soaking in breath-taking coastal views. Step into the past at the Heritage Village, where you’ll discover the UAE’s deep-rooted traditions. Admire the opulence of Emirates Palace, snap photos of the striking Etihad Towers, and visit the regal Qasr Al Watan, a palace showcasing the country’s rich heritage. If time permits, browse a local market for souvenirs. After an incredible day of exploration, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel.

Buckle up for an unforgettable adventure at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi, the ultimate destination for thrill-seekers and car enthusiasts! Your Travelxploria representative and guide will pick you up from your hotel for a scenic drive to Yas Island, where excitement awaits. With your entry ticket included, step into a world inspired by the legendary Ferrari brand. Feel the rush of speed on Formula Rossa, the world’s fastest roller coaster, or conquer the daring heights of Flying Aces. Dive into interactive experiences, race in cutting-edge simulators, and explore Ferrari’s rich history through engaging exhibits. Families can enjoy a variety of kid-friendly rides, live performances, and fun-filled attractions. Whether you're a motorsport enthusiast or just looking for an electrifying experience, Ferrari World delivers non-stop thrills. After a high-energy day, sit back and enjoy a smooth ride back to your hotel.

packages.package_name: Northern Vietnam Unveiled: Heritage, Nature & Serenity
packages.overview:
Discover Northern Vietnam with Travelxploria: Hanoi, Ha Long Bay & Ninh Binh

Step into the heart of Northern Vietnam on an unforgettable journey curated by Travelxploria, where ancient charm, natural beauty, and rich culture come together seamlessly. Begin your adventure in Hanoi, the vibrant capital that pulses with history and life—wander through the bustling Old Quarter’s narrow lanes, admire French colonial architecture, and witness centuries-old traditions at the Temple of Literature and Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum.

From the city's energy, escape to the emerald waters of Ha Long Bay, a UNESCO World Heritage Site famed for its dramatic limestone islands and hidden caves. Cruise aboard a traditional junk boat, kayak through peaceful lagoons, and watch the sunset paint the bay in golden hues.

Next, journey to the serene landscapes of Ninh Binh, often called "Ha Long Bay on land." Glide through lush rice fields and towering karsts on a sampan boat in Tam Coc, explore ancient temples in Hoa Lu—the former royal capital—and soak in panoramic views from Mua Cave's summit.

With every detail managed by Travelxploria—from guided city tours and luxury cruises to local culinary experiences and seamless transfers—this Northern Vietnam escape promises a perfect blend of discovery, relaxation, and cultural immersion.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up from your hotel to begin your full-day Hanoi city tour. Your first stop is the Ho Chi Minh Complex, where you will visit Ba Dinh Square and admire the President Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum (closed on Mondays and Fridays, but still viewable from the outside). Enjoy a sightseeing tour of the Presidential Palace (exterior view), President’s Fishpond, House on Stilts, and the iconic One Pillar Pagoda. Next, explore the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, where Confucius is worshiped and generations of scholars were trained. In the afternoon, visit Tran Quoc Pagoda, the oldest pagoda in Vietnam, before stopping at the grand Hanoi Opera House for photos. Stroll around Hoan Kiem Lake and enjoy free shopping at Dong Xuan Market and surrounding streets, filled with specialty shops.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

packages.overview: Vietnam is a captivating country where rich history, stunning landscapes, and vibrant culture come together, offering everything from bustling cities to peaceful countryside. Its breathtaking natural beauty stretches from the limestone karsts of Ha Long Bay to Sapa’s lush rice terraces, while its resilience is reflected in ancient temples, colonial architecture, and wartime relics. Whether savoring bold flavors in dishes like pho and banh mi, exploring Ho Chi Minh City’s dynamic streets, or unwinding on Phu Quoc’s pristine beaches, Vietnam enchants visitors with its warmth, charm, and timeless traditions.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.
